fact_nuggets.text: This article is about the Ability that prevents infatuation. For the Ability with a synonymous meaning, see Unaware (Ability). Oblivious (Japanese: Thickheaded) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Prevents infatuation. MD T D S Protects the Pokemon from infatuation. B S L MD GtI Prevents the Infatuated status and protects the Pokemon from the move Captivate. * The Pokemon isn't affected by the Infatuated status condition. Captivate doesn't even work on it! * S MD The Pokemon won't get infatuated. Captivate and Taunt don't work on it, either! MD RT DX The Pokemon won't get infatuated. Captivate and Taunt don't work on it, either.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation III 1.1.2 Generation IV 1.1.3 Generation V 1.1.4 Generation VI to VII 1.1.5 Generation VIII onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] A Pokemon with Oblivious cannot be affected by infatuation or by Captivate . If an infatuated Pokemon gains the Ability in battle (such as from Skill Swap ), it will be cured of infatuation. If the Pokemon with this Ability is holding a Destiny Knot , the Destiny Knot will be activated before Oblivious cures the Pokemon of infatuation. Generation III [ edit | edit source ] Oblivious has no effect against Intimidate or Taunt . Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] If the Pokemon with this Ability is infatuated and is holding a Mental Herb , Oblivious will cure the Pokemon of infatuation before the Mental Herb has a chance to be consumed. Generation V [ edit | edit source ] If the Pokemon with this Ability is infatuated and is holding a Mental Herb , the Mental Herb will be consumed before Oblivious cures the Pokemon of infatuation. Generation VI to VII [ edit | edit source ] Oblivious now prevents the Pokemon from being afflicted by Taunt . If a taunted Pokemon gains the Ability in battle (such as from Skill Swap ), it will shake off the taunt. If a Pokemon with Oblivious is taunted by a Pokemon with an Ability like Mold Breaker , the taunting will take effect, but it will then be cured once the Pokemon regains Oblivious. If the Pokemon is holding a Mental Herb , it will be consumed before Oblivious cures the Pokemon of the Taunt. Generation VIII onward [ edit | edit source ] Oblivious now also blocks Intimidate . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Oblivious has no effect outside of battle.

Prevents infatuation and protects against captivate.
